title: Owl Magistrate
move_pattern: Strict cycle starting with Magistrate Scrutiny: Magistrate Scrutiny → Peck Assault → Judicial Flight → Verdict → repeat
notes: The Owl Magistrate cycles through a grounded phase and a flying phase. On Judicial Flight it takes off and gains 1 Soar. On Verdict it dive-bombs the player, dealing heavy damage and applying 4 Vulnerable, then removes its Soar and lands. Different hurt and death sound effects play depending on whether it is currently flying.
